outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW - Dealers long gamma suppressing volatility. Spot significantly above all visible strikes indicates positive gamma regime with price stabilization.
outlook.summary: Strong bullish structure with spot (6443.75) trading well above all visible call walls. Positive total GEX indicates dealers are hedging with long stock, creating upward pressure. The 6200 level shows multi-expiry resonance - a critical magnet if price retraces. Reverse smirk in monthly confirms bullish bias. However, ITM call clusters below spot create acceleration zones on any pullback - dealers will unwind hedges if price drops toward 6350-6380.

levels.motivazione: Nearest significant OI to spot in Weekly (173 OI). ITM call cluster acts as initial friction zone. Dealer hedging unwind accelerates moves through this level.
Highest OI concentration in Weekly (305 OI). Major dealer hedge zone. Volume/OI ratio 1.83 indicates unusual activity. Critical level for pullback acceleration.
Highest 0DTE OI (80). Intraday friction level. ITM calls create hedging pressure if price approaches.
EXACT SAME STRIKE across ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE (51 OI), WEEKLY (64 OI), MONTHLY (208 OI). Total 323 OI creates powerful magnetic attraction. Major dealer concentration zone.
Structural gamma equilibrium where cumulative GEX changes sign. Coincides with Max Pain - MM target zone. Far below spot, defines positive gamma regime boundary.
